### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2 HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connect-Timeout-Ms: 180000
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.11
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4843024894782521597
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": ".PHONY: up down lint test loadtest\n\nup:\n\tdocker compose up --build -d\n\ndown:\n\tdocker compose down -v\n\nlint:\n\tpython -m ruff check .\n\tpython -m ruff format --check .\n\tpython -m mypy mini_celery\n\ntest:\n\tdocker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up --build --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from test\n\tdocker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down -v\n\nloadtest:\n\tpython -m mini_celery.cli loadtest --total 100 --concurrency 10 --task-type sleep --payload '{\"seconds\":0.05}'\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "9d199eb3fe8c98db4a81908b9fb390af0816633f9d265ef65ac5d818e9238af5",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport random\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass BackoffPolicy:\n    base_delay_sec: float = 1.0\n    multiplier: float = 2.0\n    cap_delay_sec: float = 30.0\n    jitter_ratio: float = 0.2\n\n    def compute_delay(self, attempt: int, rng: random.Random | None = None) -> float:\n        if attempt < 1:\n            raise ValueError(\"attempt must be >= 1\")\n        effective_rng = rng or random.Random()\n\n        base = min(self.cap_delay_sec, self.base_delay_sec * (self.multiplier ** (attempt - 1)))\n        jitter_span = base * self.jitter_ratio\n        jitter = (effective_rng.random() * 2.0 - 1.0) * jitter_span\n        delay = max(0.0, base + jitter)\n        return delay\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "4f457fd3f3dbed0e9f596f86d8b1d5d3f108ae8eb842fe1d76cd07d7b4232fce",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"mini_celery package.\"\"\"\n\n__all__ = [\"__version__\"]\n\n__version__ = \"0.1.0\"\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "caff976da40780eca10760a4f45631916f6d6d8caff20cd46ebda8ce04fa61c9",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom prometheus_client import CONTENT_TYPE_LATEST, Counter, Gauge, Histogram, generate_latest\n\njobs_enqueued_total = Counter(\"jobs_enqueued_total\", \"Jobs enqueued\", [\"type\", \"queue\"])\njobs_started_total = Counter(\"jobs_started_total\", \"Jobs started\", [\"type\"])\njobs_finished_total = Counter(\"jobs_finished_total\", \"Jobs finished\", [\"type\", \"state\"])\njob_duration_seconds = Histogram(\"job_duration_seconds\", \"Job execution duration\", [\"type\"])\nqueue_depth = Gauge(\"queue_depth\", \"Queue depth\", [\"queue\"])\nworker_reclaims_total = Counter(\"worker_reclaims_total\", \"Reclaimed pending messages\")\nscheduler_enqueues_total = Counter(\n    \"scheduler_enqueues_total\", \"Scheduler tick enqueues\", [\"schedule_id\"]\n)\n\n\ndef metrics_payload() -> bytes:\n    return generate_latest()\n\n\ndef metrics_content_type() -> str:\n    return CONTENT_TYPE_LATEST\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "fcb70c6c495726e899910c6f9b9137d8abbba818fedc62dab4c89b684196bf38",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport logging\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\n\nclass JsonLogFormatter(logging.Formatter):\n    def format(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> str:\n        base: dict[str, Any] = {\n            \"ts\": datetime.now(UTC).isoformat(),\n            \"level\": record.levelname,\n            \"logger\": record.name,\n            \"message\": record.getMessage(),\n        }\n\n        if record.exc_info:\n            base[\"exc_info\"] = self.formatException(record.exc_info)\n\n        standard = {\n            \"name\",\n            \"msg\",\n            \"args\",\n            \"levelname\",\n            \"levelno\",\n            \"pathname\",\n            \"filename\",\n            \"module\",\n            \"exc_info\",\n            \"exc_text\",\n            \"stack_info\",\n            \"lineno\",\n            \"funcName\",\n            \"created\",\n            \"msecs\",\n            \"relativeCreated\",\n            \"thread\",\n            \"threadName\",\n            \"processName\",\n            \"process\",\n            \"taskName\",\n        }\n        for key, value in record.__dict__.items():\n            if key not in standard and not key.startswith(\"_\"):\n                base[key] = value\n\n        return json.dumps(base, default=str)\n\n\ndef setup_logging(level: str = \"INFO\") -> None:\n    root = logging.getLogger()\n    root.setLevel(level.upper())\n    handler = logging.StreamHandler()\n    handler.setFormatter(JsonLogFormatter())\n    root.handlers.clear()\n    root.addHandler(handler)\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "9736d9b5d793f31457a9a394873987135c02a41d21d9d64d2c9d36dfc02160c3",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom contextlib import contextmanager\nfrom typing import Iterator\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import create_engine, event, text\nfrom sqlalchemy.engine import Engine\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n\nfrom mini_celery.config import Settings, get_settings\nfrom mini_celery.models import Base\n\n\nclass Database:\n    def __init__(self, database_url: str):\n        connect_args: dict[str, object] = {}\n        if database_url.startswith(\"sqlite\"):\n            connect_args = {\"check_same_thread\": False}\n\n        self.engine = create_engine(database_url, connect_args=connect_args, future=True)\n        self.SessionLocal = sessionmaker(\n            bind=self.engine,\n            class_=Session,\n            autocommit=False,\n            autoflush=False,\n            expire_on_commit=False,\n        )\n\n        if database_url.startswith(\"sqlite\"):\n\n            @event.listens_for(self.engine, \"connect\")\n            def _set_sqlite_pragma(dbapi_connection: object, _: object) -> None:\n                cursor = dbapi_connection.cursor()\n                cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL;\")\n                cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA busy_timeout=5000;\")\n                cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON;\")\n                cursor.close()\n\n    def init(self) -> None:\n        Base.metadata.create_all(bind=self.engine)\n\n    @contextmanager\n    def session(self) -> Iterator[Session]:\n        session = self.SessionLocal()\n        try:\n            yield session\n            session.commit()\n        except Exception:\n            session.rollback()\n            raise\n        finally:\n            session.close()\n\n    def check(self) -> bool:\n        with self.session() as session:\n            session.execute(text(\"SELECT 1\"))\n        return True\n\n\n_default_settings: Settings = get_settings()\ndefault_db = Database(_default_settings.database_url)\n\n\ndef get_db() -> Database:\n    return default_db\n\n\ndef get_engine() -> Engine:\n    return default_db.engine\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "cf9668c9f0f86fbb28ab6ba4eaf5903bdbb71a542209362f744bd2311c5644e4",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom functools import lru_cache\n\nfrom pydantic import Field\nfrom pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict\n\n\nclass Settings(BaseSettings):\n    model_config = SettingsConfigDict(env_file=\".env\", extra=\"ignore\")\n\n    app_name: str = \"mini-celery\"\n    log_level: str = \"INFO\"\n\n    database_url: str = \"sqlite:///REDACTED\"\n    redis_url: str = \"redis://localhost:6379/0\"\n\n    stream_prefix: str = \"jobs\"\n    consumer_group: str = \"workers\"\n    default_queue: str = \"default\"\n    worker_queues: str = \"default\"\n\n    worker_concurrency: int = 4\n    visibility_timeout_sec: int = 30\n    reclaim_interval_sec: int = 5\n\n    scheduler_poll_interval_sec: float = 1.0\n    scheduler_config_path: str = \"config/schedules.yaml\"\n\n    retry_base_delay_sec: float = 1.0\n    retry_multiplier: float = 2.0\n    retry_cap_delay_sec: float = 30.0\n    retry_jitter_ratio: float = 0.2\n\n    api_url: str = Field(default=\"http://localhost:8000\", alias=\"API_URL\")\n\n    def stream_name(self, queue: str) -> str:\n        return f\"{self.stream_prefix}:{queue}\"\n\n    @property\n    def dlq_stream_name(self) -> str:\n        return f\"{self.stream_prefix}:dlq\"\n\n    @property\n    def queues(self) -> list[str]:\n        return [q.strip() for q in self.worker_queues.split(\",\") if q.strip()]\n\n\n@lru_cache(maxsize=1)\ndef get_settings() -> Settings:\n    return Settings()\n\n\ndef reset_settings_cache() -> None:\n    get_settings.cache_clear()\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "1bc4f2b6b45dfd6bd09afbe6bdbabe19198ca1521b6367889f6a497c70a90c7a",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport hashlib\nfrom typing import Any\n\nimport httpx\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field, HttpUrl\n\nfrom mini_celery.backoff import BackoffPolicy\nfrom mini_celery.config import Settings, get_settings\nfrom mini_celery.tasks.base import (\n    FatalTaskError,\n    RetryableTaskError,\n    TaskContext,\n    TaskRegistry,\n    TaskSpec,\n)\n\n\nclass SleepPayload(BaseModel):\n    seconds: float = Field(ge=0.0, le=300.0)\n\n\nclass HttpGetPayload(BaseModel):\n    url: HttpUrl\n    timeout: float = Field(default=5.0, ge=0.1, le=60.0)\n\n\nclass CpuBurnPayload(BaseModel):\n    iterations: int = Field(default=50_000, ge=1, le=5_000_000)\n\n\nclass FailThenSucceedPayload(BaseModel):\n    failures: int = Field(default=1, ge=0, le=50)\n    value: str = \"ok\"\n\n\nclass PipelineDemoPayload(BaseModel):\n    steps: list[str] = Field(default_factory=lambda: [\"extract\", \"transform\", \"load\"])\n    step_delay: float = Field(default=0.2, ge=0.0, le=30.0)\n\n\nasync def task_sleep(ctx: TaskContext, payload: SleepPayload) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    await ctx.checkpoint()\n    if payload.seconds > 0:\n        import asyncio\n\n        await asyncio.sleep(payload.seconds)\n    await ctx.checkpoint()\n    return {\"slept_seconds\": payload.seconds}\n\n\nasync def task_http_get(_: TaskContext, payload: HttpGetPayload) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    try:\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=payload.timeout) as client:\n            response = await client.get(str(payload.url))\n    except httpx.HTTPError as exc:\n        raise RetryableTaskError(f\"HTTP request failed: {exc}\") from exc\n\n    if response.status_code >= 500:\n        raise RetryableTaskError(f\"Server error status: {response.status_code}\")\n\n    if response.status_code >= 400:\n        raise FatalTaskError(f\"Client error status: {response.status_code}\")\n\n    body = response.text[:200]\n    return {\n        \"status_code\": response.status_code,\n        \"body_preview\": body,\n        \"url\": str(payload.url),\n    }\n\n\nasync def task_cpu_burn(_: TaskContext, payload: CpuBurnPayload) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    digest = b\"seed\"\n    for i in range(payload.iterations):\n        digest = hashlib.sha256(digest + str(i).encode(\"utf-8\")).digest()\n    return {\"iterations\": payload.iterations, \"digest\": digest.hex()}\n\n\nasync def task_fail_then_succeed(ctx: TaskContext, payload: FailThenSucceedPayload) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    if ctx.attempt <= payload.failures:\n        raise RetryableTaskError(f\"Forced failure for attempt {ctx.attempt}\")\n    return {\"value\": payload.value, \"attempt\": ctx.attempt}\n\n\nasync def task_pipeline_demo(ctx: TaskContext, payload: PipelineDemoPayload) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    import asyncio\n\n    completed: list[str] = []\n    for step in payload.steps:\n        await ctx.checkpoint()\n        if payload.step_delay > 0:\n            await asyncio.sleep(payload.step_delay)\n        completed.append(step)\n    await ctx.checkpoint()\n    return {\"completed_steps\": completed, \"count\": len(completed)}\n\n\ndef default_backoff(settings: Settings) -> BackoffPolicy:\n    return BackoffPolicy(\n        base_delay_sec=settings.retry_base_delay_sec,\n        multiplier=settings.retry_multiplier,\n        cap_delay_sec=settings.retry_cap_delay_sec,\n        jitter_ratio=settings.retry_jitter_ratio,\n    )\n\n\ndef build_task_registry(settings: Settings | None = None) -> TaskRegistry:\n    effective = settings or get_settings()\n    registry = TaskRegistry()\n\n    sleep_policy = default_backoff(effective)\n    io_policy = default_backoff(effective)\n    cpu_policy = default_backoff(effective)\n    fail_policy = default_backoff(effective)\n    pipeline_policy = default_backoff(effective)\n\n    registry.register(TaskSpec(\"sleep\", SleepPayload, task_sleep, sleep_policy))\n    registry.register(TaskSpec(\"http_get\", HttpGetPayload, task_http_get, io_policy))\n    registry.register(TaskSpec(\"cpu_burn\", CpuBurnPayload, task_cpu_burn, cpu_policy))\n    registry.register(TaskSpec(\"fail_then_succeed\", FailThenSucceedPayload, task_fail_then_succeed, fail_policy))\n    registry.register(TaskSpec(\"pipeline_demo\", PipelineDemoPayload, task_pipeline_demo, pipeline_policy))\n\n    return registry\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "306768b0a21360b8b7f205644e1453913fec7a6a14feaa6fa199f76a703b7c3d",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 04:02:38 GMT
Vary: Origin
```

```
{
  "1:VARINT": 1
}
```

```
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-

loadtest\n\nup:\n\tdocker compose up --build -d\n\ndown:\n\tdocker compose down -v\n\nlint:\n\tpython -m ruff check .\n\tpython -m ruff format --check .\n\tpython -m mypy mini_celery\n\ntest:\n\tdocker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up --build --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from test\n\tdocker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down -v\n\nloadtest:\n\tpython dataclass\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass BackoffPolicy:\n    base_delay_sec: float = 1.0\n    multiplier: float = 2.0\n    cap_delay_sec: float = 30.0\n    jitter_ratio: float = 0.2\n\n    def compute_delay(self, attempt: int, rng: random.Random | None = None) -> float:\n        if attempt < 1:\n            raise ValueError(\"attempt must be >= 1\")\n        effective_rng = rng or random.Random()\n\n        base = min(self.cap_delay_sec, self.base_delay_sec * (self.multiplier ** (attempt - 1)))\n        jitter_span = base * self.jitter_ratio\n        jitter = (effective_rng.random() * 2.0 - 1.0) * jitter_span\n        delay = max(0.0, base + jitter)\n        return delay\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "4f457fd3f3dbed0e9f596f86d8b1d5d3f108ae8eb842fe1d76cd07d7b4232fce", [\"__version__\"]\n\n__version__ = \"0.1.0\"\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "caff976da40780eca10760a4f45631916f6d6d8caff20cd46ebda8ce04fa61c9", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom prometheus_client import CONTENT_TYPE_LATEST, Counter, Gauge, Histogram, generate_latest\n\njobs_enqueued_total = Counter(\"jobs_enqueued_total\", \"Jobs enqueued\", [\"type\", \"queue\"])\njobs_started_total = Counter(\"jobs_started_total\", \"Jobs started\", [\"type\"])\njobs_finished_total = Counter(\"jobs_finished_total\", \"Jobs finished\", [\"type\", \"state\"])\njob_duration_seconds = Histogram(\"job_duration_seconds\", \"Job execution duration\", [\"type\"])\nqueue_depth = Gauge(\"queue_depth\", \"Queue depth\", [\"queue\"])\nworker_reclaims_total = Counter(\"worker_reclaims_total\", \"Reclaimed pending messages\")\nscheduler_enqueues_total = Counter(\n    \"scheduler_enqueues_total\", \"Scheduler tick enqueues\", [\"schedule_id\"]\n)\n\n\ndef metrics_payload() -> bytes:\n    return generate_latest()\n\n\ndef metrics_content_type() -> str:\n    return CONTENT_TYPE_LATEST\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "fcb70c6c495726e899910c6f9b9137d8abbba818fedc62dab4c89b684196bf38", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport logging\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\n\nclass JsonLogFormatter(logging.Formatter):\n    def format(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> str:\n        base: dict[str, Any] = {\n            \"ts\": datetime.now(UTC).isoformat(),\n            \"level\": record.levelname,\n            \"logger\": record.name,\n            \"message\": record.getMessage(),\n        }\n\n        if record.exc_info:\n            base[\"exc_info\"] = self.formatException(record.exc_info)\n\n        standard = {\n            \"name\",\n            \"msg\",\n            \"args\",\n            \"levelname\",\n            \"levelno\",\n            \"pathname\",\n            \"filename\",\n            \"module\",\n            \"exc_info\",\n            \"exc_text\",\n            \"stack_info\",\n            \"lineno\",\n            \"funcName\",\n            \"created\",\n            \"msecs\",\n            \"relativeCreated\",\n            \"thread\",\n            \"threadName\",\n            \"processName\",\n            \"process\",\n            \"taskName\",\n        }\n        for key, value in record.__dict__.items():\n            if key not in standard and not key.startswith(\"_\"):\n                base[key] = value\n\n        return json.dumps(base, default=str)\n\n\ndef setup_logging(level: str = \"INFO\") -> None:\n    root = logging.getLogger()\n    root.setLevel(level.upper())\n    handler = logging.StreamHandler()\n    handler.setFormatter(JsonLogFormatter())\n    root.handlers.clear()\n    root.addHandler(handler)\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "9736d9b5d793f31457a9a394873987135c02a41d21d9d64d2c9d36dfc02160c3", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom contextlib import contextmanager\nfrom typing import Iterator\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import create_engine, event, text\nfrom sqlalchemy.engine import Engine\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n\nfrom mini_celery.config import Settings, get_settings\nfrom mini_celery.models import Base\n\n\nclass Database:\n    def __init__(self, database_url: str):\n        connect_args: dict[str, object] = {}\n        if database_url.startswith(\"sqlite\"):\n            connect_args = {\"check_same_thread\": False}\n\n        self.engine = create_engine(database_url, connect_args=connect_args, future=True)\n        self.SessionLocal = sessionmaker(\n            bind=self.engine,\n            class_=Session,\n            autocommit=False,\n            autoflush=False,\n            expire_on_commit=False,\n        )\n\n        if database_url.startswith(\"sqlite\"):\n\n            @event.listens_for(self.engine, \"connect\")\n            def _set_sqlite_pragma(dbapi_connection: object, _: object) -> None:\n                cursor = dbapi_connection.cursor()\n                cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL;\")\n                cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA busy_timeout=5000;\")\n                cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON;\")\n                cursor.close()\n\n    def init(self) -> None:\n        Base.metadata.create_all(bind=self.engine)\n\n    @contextmanager\n    def session(self) -> Iterator[Session]:\n        session = self.SessionLocal()\n        try:\n            yield session\n            session.commit()\n        except Exception:\n            session.rollback()\n            raise\n        finally:\n            session.close()\n\n    def check(self) -> bool:\n        with self.session() as session:\n            session.execute(text(\"SELECT 1\"))\n        return True\n\n\n_default_settings: Settings = get_settings()\ndefault_db = Database(_default_settings.database_url)\n\n\ndef get_db() -> Database:\n    return default_db\n\n\ndef get_engine() -> Engine:\n    return default_db.engine\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "cf9668c9f0f86fbb28ab6ba4eaf5903bdbb71a542209362f744bd2311c5644e4", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom functools import lru_cache\n\nfrom pydantic import Field\nfrom pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict\n\n\nclass Settings(BaseSettings):\n    model_config = SettingsConfigDict(env_file=\".env\", extra=\"ignore\")\n\n    app_name: str = \"mini-celery\"\n    log_level: str = \"INFO\"\n\n    database_url: str = \"sqlite:///REDACTED\"\n    redis_url: str = \"redis://localhost:6379/0\"\n\n    stream_prefix: str = \"jobs\"\n    consumer_group: str = \"workers\"\n    default_queue: str = \"default\"\n    worker_queues: str = \"default\"\n\n    worker_concurrency: int = 4\n    visibility_timeout_sec: int = 30\n    reclaim_interval_sec: int = 5\n\n    scheduler_poll_interval_sec: float = 1.0\n    scheduler_config_path: str = \"config/schedules.yaml\"\n\n    retry_base_delay_sec: float = 1.0\n    retry_multiplier: float = 2.0\n    retry_cap_delay_sec: float = 30.0\n    retry_jitter_ratio: float = 0.2\n\n    api_url: str = Field(default=\"http://localhost:8000\", alias=\"API_URL\")\n\n    def stream_name(self, queue: str) -> str:\n        return f\"{self.stream_prefix}:{queue}\"\n\n    @property\n    def dlq_stream_name(self) -> str:\n        return f\"{self.stream_prefix}:dlq\"\n\n    @property\n    def queues(self) -> list[str]:\n        return [q.strip() for q in self.worker_queues.split(\",\") if q.strip()]\n\n\n@lru_cache(maxsize=1)\ndef get_settings() -> Settings:\n    return Settings()\n\n\ndef reset_settings_cache() -> None:\n    get_settings.cache_clear()\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "1bc4f2b6b45dfd6bd09afbe6bdbabe19198ca1521b6367889f6a497c70a90c7a", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport hashlib\nfrom typing import Any\n\nimport httpx\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field, HttpUrl\n\nfrom mini_celery.backoff import BackoffPolicy\nfrom mini_celery.config import Settings, get_settings\nfrom mini_celery.tasks.base import (\n    FatalTaskError,\n    RetryableTaskError,\n    TaskContext,\n    TaskRegistry,\n    TaskSpec,\n)\n\n\nclass SleepPayload(BaseModel):\n    seconds: float = Field(ge=0.0, le=300.0)\n\n\nclass HttpGetPayload(BaseModel):\n    url: HttpUrl\n    timeout: float = Field(default=5.0, ge=0.1, le=60.0)\n\n\nclass CpuBurnPayload(BaseModel):\n    iterations: int = Field(default=50_000, ge=1, le=5_000_000)\n\n\nclass FailThenSucceedPayload(BaseModel):\n    failures: int = Field(default=1, ge=0, le=50)\n    value: str = \"ok\"\n\n\nclass PipelineDemoPayload(BaseModel):\n    steps: list[str] = Field(default_factory=lambda: [\"extract\", \"transform\", \"load\"])\n    step_delay: float = Field(default=0.2, ge=0.0, le=30.0)\n\n\nasync def task_sleep(ctx: TaskContext, payload: SleepPayload) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    await ctx.checkpoint()\n    if payload.seconds > 0:\n        import asyncio\n\n        await asyncio.sleep(payload.seconds)\n    await ctx.checkpoint()\n    return {\"slept_seconds\": payload.seconds}\n\n\nasync def task_http_get(_: TaskContext, payload: HttpGetPayload) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    try:\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=payload.timeout) as client:\n            response = await client.get(str(payload.url))\n    except httpx.HTTPError as exc:\n        raise RetryableTaskError(f\"HTTP request failed: {exc}\") from exc\n\n    if response.status_code >= 500:\n        raise RetryableTaskError(f\"Server error status: {response.status_code}\")\n\n    if response.status_code >= 400:\n        raise FatalTaskError(f\"Client error status: {response.status_code}\")\n\n    body = response.text[:200]\n    return {\n        \"status_code\": response.status_code,\n        \"body_preview\": body,\n        \"url\": str(payload.url),\n    }\n\n\nasync def task_cpu_burn(_: TaskContext, payload: CpuBurnPayload) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    digest = b\"seed\"\n    for i in range(payload.iterations):\n        digest = hashlib.sha256(digest + str(i).encode(\"utf-8\")).digest()\n    return {\"iterations\": payload.iterations, \"digest\": digest.hex()}\n\n\nasync def task_fail_then_succeed(ctx: TaskContext, payload: FailThenSucceedPayload) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    if ctx.attempt <= payload.failures:\n        raise RetryableTaskError(f\"Forced failure for attempt {ctx.attempt}\")\n    return {\"value\": payload.value, \"attempt\": ctx.attempt}\n\n\nasync def task_pipeline_demo(ctx: TaskContext, payload: PipelineDemoPayload) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    import asyncio\n\n    completed: list[str] = []\n    for step in payload.steps:\n        await ctx.checkpoint()\n        if payload.step_delay > 0:\n            await asyncio.sleep(payload.step_delay)\n        completed.append(step)\n    await ctx.checkpoint()\n    return {\"completed_steps\": completed, \"count\": len(completed)}\n\n\ndef default_backoff(settings: Settings) -> BackoffPolicy:\n    return BackoffPolicy(\n        base_delay_sec=settings.retry_base_delay_sec,\n        multiplier=settings.retry_multiplier,\n        cap_delay_sec=settings.retry_cap_delay_sec,\n        jitter_ratio=settings.retry_jitter_ratio,\n    )\n\n\ndef build_task_registry(settings: Settings | None = None) -> TaskRegistry:\n    effective = settings or get_settings()\n    registry = TaskRegistry()\n\n    sleep_policy = default_backoff(effective)\n    io_policy = default_backoff(effective)\n    cpu_policy = default_backoff(effective)\n    fail_policy = default_backoff(effective)\n    pipeline_policy = default_backoff(effective)\n\n    registry.register(TaskSpec(\"sleep\", SleepPayload, task_sleep, sleep_policy))\n    registry.register(TaskSpec(\"http_get\", HttpGetPayload, task_http_get, io_policy))\n    registry.register(TaskSpec(\"cpu_burn\", CpuBurnPayload, task_cpu_burn, cpu_policy))\n    registry.register(TaskSpec(\"fail_then_succeed\", FailThenSucceedPayload, task_fail_then_succeed, fail_policy))\n    registry.register(TaskSpec(\"pipeline_demo\", PipelineDemoPayload, task_pipeline_demo, pipeline_policy))\n\n    return registry\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "306768b0a21360b8b7f205644e1453913fec7a6a14feaa6fa199f76a703b7c3d", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}]}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2
```

```
duration: 801ms
```
